seeds.enhancement_context: Seed trainer-signoff queues, step progression provenance, and readiness-driven qualification modeling.
seeds.future_state_delta: Move from generic training CRUD to role-gated, auditable, progression-aware qualification workflows.

seeds.enhancement_context: Seed bay-aware planning constraints and lean flow semantics in scheduler interactions.
seeds.future_state_delta: Move from interactive visual scheduling to constraint-informed execution reflecting real hangar flow.

source_artifacts: Tech capacity and training report BJC Jan 2023 1.2 (1).pdf
seeds.enhancement_context: Seed auto-schedule constraints with PTO/training burden and coarse-leveling assumptions.
seeds.future_state_delta: Move from baseline assignment logic to workforce-readiness and capacity-aware auto-allocation.

seeds.future_state_delta: Move from chart parity to operationally credible KPIs tied to real workforce and shop dynamics.

seeds.feature_name: Work Order Routing Templates + Standard Minutes
seeds.enhancement_context: Seed routing templates with standardized task sequencing and signoff-aware execution structure.
seeds.future_state_delta: Move from ad hoc WO execution to reusable operation templates with standard-minute baselines.

source_artifacts: Tech capacity and training report BJC Jan 2023 1.2 (1).pdf
seeds.feature_name: Operational Report Builder + Scheduled Report Runs
seeds.enhancement_context: Seed scheduled reports with cadence and model assumptions used in recurring field planning cycles.
seeds.future_state_delta: Move from static reporting to recurring operational intelligence runs with consistent planning semantics.

seeds.enhancement_context: Seed cross-site navigation with real repair-station location and contact metadata patterns.
seeds.future_state_delta: Move from generic multi-site UI to field-informed site selection and location-scoped workflows.

seeds.enhancement_context: Seed search/index strategy for large external entity catalogs and location-coded lookup flows.
seeds.future_state_delta: Move from command-palette baseline to high-scale operational search tuned for field datasets.

required_domains: Regulatory compliance authority and audit evidence
seeds.enhancement_context: Seed AD/SB compliance logic with current repair-station manual authority and quality-control constraints.
seeds.future_state_delta: Move from static AD/SB tracking to policy-grounded compliance surfaces aligned to authoritative manuals.

required_domains: Regulatory compliance authority and audit evidence
seeds.enhancement_context: Seed conformity workflows with DCT evidence structure and real audit finding patterns.
seeds.future_state_delta: Move from generic conformity records to inspection evidence models aligned with FAA DCT/audit criteria.

seeds.feature_name: Operational Report Builder + Scheduled Report Runs
seeds.enhancement_context: Seed recurring report templates with historical labor-rate and flat-rate benchmarking context.
seeds.future_state_delta: Move from generic scheduled reports to historically anchored estimation and margin-intelligence reporting.

seeds.feature_name: Work Order Routing Templates + Standard Minutes
required_domains: Field photo evidence for retrofit traceability
seeds.enhancement_context: Seed routing templates with visual retrofit baselines and panel-state evidence patterns.
seeds.future_state_delta: Move from abstract template definitions to evidence-backed routing based on real retrofit baseline conditions.

seeds.enhancement_context: Seed dashboard/report parity targets with real legacy operational telemetry screenshots.
seeds.future_state_delta: Move from synthetic KPI views to workflows that reflect observed operational visibility and handoff states.

required_domains: Field photo evidence for retrofit traceability
seeds.enhancement_context: Seed part-lineage and receiving-inspection flows with real component-bay and avionics evidence patterns.
seeds.future_state_delta: Move from document-only part lineage to image-linked evidence chains across install/remove/inspection states.
